title: Vscode Setup
content:
⬅ Install Virtual Studio Code Python Virtual Environments ➡

## Setup Visual Studio Code ### Video Tutorial You can watch this video tutorial or read the full step-by step written tutorial below. ### Written Tutorial When you first start Visual Studio Code, there are a some basic questions to answer. First choose you theme, then click **Next Section**. Now click on the Python logo. Then click on the **Install** button. When finished the install button will disappear. if you have an alert to install WSL extension, then click on the **Install** button. It will then be automatically installed. Congratulations, you have setup your Visual Studio Code program. Now we move on to finalize the Virtual Environments for Python.

⬅ Install Virtual Studio Code Python Virtual Environments ➡
